voice.tone: raw, direct, personal — the founder's unfiltered signal
voice.personality: this is the personal QVC channel for Terravian — everything is in first person, everything is real
do: First-person singular — this is the personal broadcast channel
Reference the 30-minute weekly master content that feeds the entire empire
Authentic and unpolished — the opposite of corporate content
Use 911 as urgent signal — this matters, right now
dont: Never sound like a brand — this is a person
Avoid anything that feels scripted or produced
Don't dilute the personal signal with product pitches
sample_phrases: Every week I show up and tell the truth.
This isn't content. This is signal.
You want to know how the empire runs? Watch this.

aida.attention_hook: an urgent personal truth or observation that demands attention
aida.interest: what Terravian shares weekly on 911.today that you can't get elsewhere
aida.desire: being in the inner circle — the audience that sees the unfiltered version
